batch_summary.note: Jan 2025: 1 primary RF-09 signal. S006 Sev-2 — 'you gaslight everything' sustained global accusation. Arc Sev-2 sustained.

primary_flags.summary: Jan 2025: Melissa deploys explicit, comprehensive DARVO-inversion — accuses Eli of gaslighting 'everything.' Context: Jan 15 2025 conflict cluster (RF-04 primary, B-022 mega-cluster). ROW-7724: 'You gaslight' — brief accusation. ROW-7740: 'You gaslight everything' — escalated global indictment of Eli's entire perception of reality. This is the most significant Level E signal in Phase A/B transition: not a dispute about a specific claim, but a comprehensive attack on Eli's credibility as a reporter of reality. ADD-004 arc escalation: 'You gaslight everything' is the 5th+ documented instance of Melissa attacking Eli's perception, and first use of global ('everything') qualifier — arc severity elevates to Sev-2 (sustained across multiple conflict periods). Elevation justification per ADD-001: 'Level E = Sev-2 when sustained across multiple episodes.' The Jan 2025 cluster comes after documented instances in B-003, B-005, B-009, B-019 — five distinct conflict periods. ADD-003 compound: this occurs at the center of a DARVO mega-cluster (RF-04 B-022 primary) — explicit gaslight accusation within DARVO = COMP-RF09-004 RF-09+RF-04. Sub-pattern: DARVO-inversion naming is the clearest example in the dataset of the manipulative party projecting their own behavior onto the target.

arc_updates.event: S006 signal added; arc severity escalated to Sev-2 (ADD-004 sustained threshold)
